subcodes.first_line: O Qásim! Though thou art not present in outward appearance, yet thou art mentioned before Our Countenance. Render thou thanks unto God for this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قاسم اگرچه حاضر نیستی بر حسب ظاهر ولکن تلقاء وجه مذکوری ان احمد الله بذلک
subcodes.subjects: @importance of prayer, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
